General.Name: Dashan Education Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Dashan Education Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides education services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Extracurricular Programmes; Brand Operation and Management; Overseas Education; Training and Consultancy, and Others segments. The company offers extracurricular programmes for personal attainment in arts, sports, and dancing for children and teenagers; and training services to teaching staff and other consultancy services for education institutions, schools, and other entities. It also acts as an agent that offers overseas education consultation services; and provides brand name licensing and related advisory, and vocational education services, as well as sales of books and materials. In addition, the company is involved in the provision of technical, study abroad agency, consultancy, after-school education, and physical training services. Dashan Education Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
